description: Machine-readable companion to the static HTML report. The minimum payload a CI comment builder needs to summarize a run without re-reading raw summary.json or events.jsonl. Frozen surface: report HTML layout is explicitly NOT stable until PLAN-003 0.9.0; only this index's fields are versioned (additive within v1).

artifact_paths.description: Artifact locations keyed by type. Empty object when the run dir is unavailable or was not written (e.g. --dry-run). Path separators are POSIX-normalised.

cost_usd.description: Total USD spent, or null when the run was a dry-run or the engine did not record a cost (e.g. fake harness). Never absent from the key set.

finding_counts.description: Findings tallied by severity. Always present; every severity key is present (zero when none of that severity).

top_findings.description: At most 5 redacted finding summaries. Empty list when there are no findings or they were suppressed.

file.description: Redacted affected file path (POSIX-normalised), or null when the finding has no file-level location.

line.description: 1-based line number, or null when the finding has no file-level location.

title: RevRem report index v1
